reason: General quality bar for the change
IPC + SSH/tunnel failures must never throw across IPC; verify graceful {ok,error} returns
Verify LLM env is injected only for borrow-mode and never for remote-native 24/7 sessions
Verify new IPC channels are registered correctly
Verify types across new preload/IPC signatures and per-host connection registry
Commit/PR conventions for the phased work
